# Transcrição: A_hack_to_improve_your_stage_presence

- **Fonte:** A_hack_to_improve_your_stage_presence
- **Duração:** 01:17

---

## [00:00 - 01:17]

Let's talk about stage presence. One big factor is how you use your voice. Another big factor is how you use your body. But there's a third factor that people often don't talk about. It's mindset. You need to adopt a certain mindset and a way of thinking about stage presence that will really allow you to have this energy that kind of lives under your skin, that wants to explode. Let me explain. When I'm backstage and I'm about to go up to the front of the stage, what I'm doing back here is I'm amping myself up to a level 12 out of 10 energy. I either listen to really intense music or I do push-ups, I jump around, I get my kind of adrenaline running. And then when I walk on stage, I control the level 12 energy that I feel inside down to an eight out of 10. And what's crazy is when I walk out feeling a level 12 out of 10, but only showing a level eight, the audience can feel, literally feel, the energy that's radiating under my skin. And this little mindset hack is what really helps you develop that incredible stage presence you see from incredible speakers all around the world. So remember, stage presence requires three things, vocal mastery, body language mastery. And then on top of that, it comes down to that little mind hack.
